title: -39. Brush[ ... words ]
content:
To continue serving our readers, I have removed Korean novels due to copyright issues.

Thank you for your continued support. I'm still working hard to bring you more great novels and the best reading experience possible.

Inro interacts with a young underage girl. He orders her to put her hands behind her back, thrust her chest forward, and expose her body.

He becomes sexually aroused while staring at and commenting on her small/pre-adult breasts, repeatedly stating that small chests are superior to larger ones. He uses a brush to touch and press on her breasts while describing their shape and size in detail.

He complains about usually buying adult women with large breasts or buttocks as sex slaves for his “master,” but prefers girls like her. He apologizes for a previous incident where he lost control, entered her cell, got on top of her, and used a painful binding ability on her that caused electric shock-like pain, leaving her terrified and crying.

If you find any errors (non-standard content, ads redirect, broken links, etc..), Please let us know so we can fix it as soon as possible.

Made with ♥ for Novel Lovers
